text:
- fix qpopper.in Different location of the file.

ture	mail/qpopper/files/qpopper.in

reference PR#163639

Port maintainer (bc979@lafn.org) is cc'd.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/qpopper
make __MAKE_CONF=/dev/null WITH_STANDALONE_MODE=1 insatall
